current_entries.en_definition: endlessness, unlimitedness, absence of a beginning, end or limits to size.

A number which is very large compared to some characteristic number. For example, in optics, an object which is much further away than the focal length of a lens is said to be "at infinity", as the distance of the image from the lens varies very little as the distance increases further.
The power to affect, control or manipulate something or someone; the ability to change the development of fluctuating things such as conduct, thoughts or decisions.

examples.english: Do you think our climate has an influence on our character?
examples.chinese: 你覺得氣候會不會影響人的性格呢？

current_entries.en_definition: An action exerted by a person or thing with such power on another to cause change.
A person or thing exerting such power or action.
(transitive) To have an effect on by using gentle or subtle action; to exert an influence upon; to modify, bias, or sway; to persuade or induce.
Not formal or ceremonious.
Not in accord with the usual regulations.
(of language) Reflecting everyday, non-ceremonious usage.
(systems theory) An underlying base or foundation for a building, organization, or system. [from 1887]

examples.english: The infrastructure of an application is directly related to its overall performance.
examples.chinese: 一个应用的架构直接关系到它的整体性能。

current_entries.en_definition: The facilities, services and installations needed for the functioning of a community or society.
The act of entering.
A door or other means of entering.
(astronomy) The entrance of the Moon into the shadow of the Earth in eclipses, or the Sun's entrance into a sign, etc.
That which a person is entitled to inherit, by law or testament, such as the part of an estate (i.e., a portion).
(biology, genetic algorithms) The biological attributes passed hereditarily from ancestors to their offspring.
(programming, object-oriented) The mechanism whereby parts of a superclass are available to instances of its subclass.
Harmless; producing no ill effect.
Inoffensive; unprovocative; unexceptionable.
The act of innovating; the introduction of something new, in customs, rites, etc.
Something new, and contrary to established customs, manners, or rites.
Exhibiting unsoundness or disorder of mind; not sane; utterly mad.
(informal) Characterized by excess or the utmost folly; ridiculous; impractical.
Text carved on a wall or plaque, such as a memorial or gravestone, or on some other item.
The text on a coin.
An arthropod (in the Insecta class) characterized by six legs, up to four wings, and a chitinous exoskeleton.

examples.english: What do you call this insect in English?
examples.chinese: 这种昆虫在英语中叫什么？

current_entries.en_definition: (archaic, or, loosely) Any small arthropod similar to an insect, including spiders, centipedes, millipedes, etc.
(derogatory) A contemptible or powerless person.
To hint; to suggest tacitly (usually something bad) while avoiding a direct statement.
(figurative, by extension) To ingratiate; to obtain access to or introduce something by subtle, cunning or artful means.
The act of examining something, often closely.
An organization that checks that certain laws or rules are obeyed.
(physiology, uncountable) The drawing of air into the lungs, accomplished in mammals by elevation of the chest walls and flattening of the diaphragm, as part of the act of breathing.

examples.english: What is your greatest source of inspiration?
examples.chinese: 什么是您最大的灵感来源？

current_entries.en_definition: A single inward breath (intake of air).

A supernatural divine influence on the prophets, apostles, or sacred writers, by which they were qualified to communicate moral or religious truth with authority; a supernatural influence which qualifies people to receive and communicate divine truth; also, the truth communicated.
The act or process of an elevating or stimulating influence upon the intellect, emotions or creativity.
(legal) Present; current; extant.
Occurring immediately; immediate; present.
A very short period of time; a moment.
A single, usually precise, point in time.
The act of instructing, teaching, or providing with information or knowledge.
An order or command.
(computing) A single operation of a processor defined by an instruction set architecture.
(transitive) To make into an instrument for achieving a goal.
(music, transitive) To transcribe for instrumental execution a piece of music written for the human voice
Action or form of speech deliberately intended to be rude; (countable) a particular act or statement having this effect.
Something that causes offence (for example, by being of an unacceptable quality).
(transitive) To be insensitive, insolent, or rude to (somebody); to affront or demean (someone). [from 17th c.]
A means of indemnity against a future occurrence of an uncertain event.

examples.english: Can I use my medical insurance?
examples.chinese: 我可以使用我的醫療保險嗎？

current_entries.en_definition: The business of providing insurance.
(mostly, uncountable) The quality of making use or having made use of such capacities: depth of understanding, mental quickness.

examples.english: To have doubts about oneself is the first sign of intelligence.
examples.chinese: 自我怀疑是聪明的第一标志。

current_entries.en_definition: An entity that has such capacities.
A political or military department, agency or unit designed to gather information, usually secret, about the enemy or about hostile activities.
Of a characteristic: extreme or very high or strong in degree; severe; also, excessive, towering.
(also, figurative) Under tension; tightly drawn; strained, stressed, tense.
The act of interfering with something, or something that interferes.

examples.english: I won't allow you to continue your interference in my daughter's life.
examples.chinese: 我不允许你继续干涉我女儿的生活。

current_entries.en_definition: (physics) An effect caused by the superposition of two systems of waves.
A distortion on a broadcast signal due to atmospheric or other effects.
(music, theater) A performer who presents a piece of art in a distinct style, particularly so as to make older works relevant to their audience.
(computing) A program that converts commands into machine language in real time rather than compiling it in advance. [1954]
A distance in space.

examples.english: There was a long interval before he replied.

current_entries.en_definition: A period of time.
(mathematics) A connected section of the real line which may be empty or have a length of zero.
(transitive, of people) To cause (someone) to be acquainted (with someone else).

examples.english: Allow me to introduce Mayuko to you.

current_entries.en_definition: (transitive) To add (something) to a system, a mixture, or a container.
(transitive) To bring (something) into practice.
To design a new process or mechanism.

examples.english: Don't use "discover" when you mean "invent".
examples.chinese: 當你在指「發明」的時候，不要用「發現」這個字。

current_entries.en_definition: To create something fictional for a particular purpose.
(music) The reversal of an interval; the move of one pitch in an interval up or down an octave.
(music) The position of a chord which has a note other than the root as its bass note.
(music) The flipping of a melody or contrapuntal line so that high notes become low and vice versa; the reversal of a pitch contour.

(grammar) Deviation from standard word order, as for example by putting the predicate before the subject. It takes place in questions with auxiliary verbs; in normal, affirmative clauses beginning with a negative particle, for the purpose of emphasis; and in other rhetorical devices or unusual situations.
To spend money, time, or energy on something, especially for some benefit or purpose; used with in.
To commit money or capital in the hope of financial gain.
(intransitive) To cause to be involved in; to cause to form strong attachments to.
To ceremonially install someone in some office.
(transitive) To inquire into or study in order to ascertain facts or information.
(transitive) To examine, look into, or scrutinize in order to discover something hidden or secret.
(intransitive) To conduct an inquiry or examination.
Not violable; not to be infringed.

examples.chinese: 我的房間是不可侵犯的避難所。

current_entries.en_definition: Incapable of being injured or invaded; indestructible.
Entanglement; a spiralling inwards; intricacy.
(economics, social science, of a society or nation) A cessation of development or progress involving intense inner competition.
(neologism) A state of increased competition for limited resources, requiring great effort to stay ahead.
(mathematics) An endofunction whose square is equal to the identity function; a function equal to its inverse.
(medicine) The shrinking of an organ (such as the uterus) to a former size.
A large island in northwestern Europe.

current_entries.en_definition: A country in northwestern Europe.

(rhetoric) The quality of a statement that, when taken in context, may actually mean something different from, or the opposite of, what is written literally; the use of words expressing something other than their literal intention, often in a humorous context.
(informal) Contradiction between circumstances and expectations; condition contrary to what might be expected. [from the 1640s]
(biblical character) The son of Abraham and Sarah, father of Esau and Jacob, from whom the Hebrew people trace their descent.
A en given name.
A book of the Old Testament of the Bible, and of the Tanakh.
(Abrahamism, biblical character) A prophet, the author of the Book of Isaiah.
A en given name.
A province of Molise, Italy.
A town, the capital of Isernia.
A town in Tyumen Oblast, Russia.
A left tributary of the Irtush River flowing 1,520 miles through Kazakhstan and Russia and passing through Astana, capital of Kazakhstan.
(ethnology) Sexual bonding or marriage involving partners of equal social status.
(biology) A form of sexual reproduction involving gametes of similar morphology.
(Biblical) A Biblical region of Western Asia roughly coextensive with the modern State of Israel, known in the Bible as the Land of Israel and considered the ancestral homeland of the Jewish people.
A en given name.
Another name for Jacob, notably after Genesis 32:28 and in later references.
Pertaining to Italy.

current_entries.en_definition: Pertaining to its people or their cultures.
Pertaining to their language.
An inhabitant of Italy, or a person of Italian descent.
The official language of Italy, also spoken in San Marino, the Vatican, and parts of Argentina, Slovenia and Switzerland.

(Indo-European studies) Pertaining to a subfamily of the Centum branch of the Indo-European language family, that includes Latin and other languages (as Oscan, Umbrian) spoken by the peoples of ancient Italy
(typography, of a typeface or font) Designed to resemble a handwriting style developed in Italy in the 16th century.

A village in Maliutianka starostynskyi okruh, Boiarka urban hromada, Fastiv Raion, Kyiv Oblast, Ukraine, founded in 1926.
A rural settlement, the administrative centre of Ivankiv settlement hromada, Vyshhorod Raion, Kyiv Oblast, Ukraine, founded in 1589.
A village in Skala-Podilska settlement hromada, Chortkiv Raion, Ternopil Oblast, Ukraine, first mentioned in 1443, but habitation dates from the 1710s.
A village in Yampil urban hromada, Mohyliv-Podilskyi Raion, Vinnytsia Oblast, Ukraine, extant since at least the seventeenth century.

A former raion of Kyiv Oblast, Ukraine, established in 1923, expanded by the annexation to it of Chornobyl Raion in 1988, disestablished in July 2020.

Any of several plants, of the genus Jasminum, mostly native to Asia, having fragrant white or yellow flowers.

Protective; zealously guarding; careful in the protection of something (or someone) one has or appreciates, especially one's spouse or lover. [from 14th c.]

A en given name.

(biblical) One of the books in the New Testament of the Bible, the epistles of John (1 John, 2 John and 3 John).
(slang, US) A prostitute's client.
(slang, US) A device or place to urinate and defecate: now usually a toilet or lavatory, but also (dated) a chamber pot or outhouse.

A en given name.

A reporter, someone who professionally reports on news and current events.
The power or faculty of performing such operations; especially, when unqualified, the faculty of judging or deciding rightly, justly, or wisely.

A en given name.

examples.english: Romeo and Juliet is on at the theatre.

current_entries.en_definition: One of the title characters of Shakespeare's play Romeo and Juliet.

(also jump-roping, jumping rope) The activity, game or exercise in which a person must jump, bounce or skip repeatedly while a length of rope is swung over and under, both ends held in the hands of the jumper, or alternately, held by two other participants.
(colloquial) A single jump in this game or activity, counted as a measure of achievement.

(intransitive) To repeatedly jump over a rope, the ends of which are held by the jumper or by two others, while the rope is swung under the feet and over the head of the jumper; to play the game of jump rope; to exercise by jumping rope.

(Roman god) The King of the Gods, also called Jove. Equivalent to the Greek Zeus, Jupiter was one of the children of Saturn. As supreme god of the Roman pantheon, Jupiter was the god of thunder, lightning, and storms, and appropriately called the god of light and sky.
A township in Kittson County, Minnesota, named after the planet.
A mountain range on the border of France and Switzerland, extending into Germany; in full, Jura Mountains.

An island of the Inner Hebrides in Argyll and Bute council area, Scotland.
The power, right, or authority to interpret and apply the law.
The limits or territory within which authority may be exercised.
Factually right, correct; factual.

Only, simply, merely.

Exactly, precisely, perfectly.
The state or characteristic of being just or fair.

A title given to judges of certain courts; capitalized when placed before a name.

The core, center, or essence of an object or system.

(mathematics, algebra, loosely, of a morphism f between algebraic structures) The set of elements of the domain of f which are mapped to an identity element.

examples.english: The Swiss keyboard doesn't have a ß.

The sound of a bell knelling; a toll (particularly one signalling a death).

One of five administrative districts of the above region as viewed by the Serbian government.
A village in Oleshky urban hromada, Kherson Raion, Kherson Oblast, Ukraine, founded in 1758.
A village in Hornostaivka settlement hromada, Kakhovka Raion, Kherson Oblast, Ukraine, founded in 1910.

A room, building or institution equipped for scientific research, experimentation or analysis.

That which requires hard work for its accomplishment; that which demands effort.
Workers in general; the working class, the workforce; sometimes specifically the labour movement, organised labour.

A union territory of India. Capitals: Leh and Kargil.

A town, the provincial capital of Latina, Lazio, Italy.

A narrow surface projecting horizontally from a wall, cliff, or other surface.

A lode; a limited mass of rock bearing valuable mineral.
A layer or stratum.
A large city and metropolitan borough of West Yorkshire, England.

(countable, figure of speech) A word or phrase used in such implied comparison.
A process by which a task is completed; a way of doing something (followed by the adposition of, to or for before the purpose of the process).

examples.english: Your method is different from mine.
examples.chinese: 你的方法和我的不一樣。

current_entries.en_definition: (object-oriented) A subroutine or function belonging to a class or object.
(originally, sciences) The study of methods used in a field.
(loosely) A collection of methods, practices, procedures and rules used by those who work in some field.
The implementation of such methods etc.
(book of the bible) A book of the Old Testament of Bible, and of the Tanakh.
An Ephraimite featured in Judges 17–18 and protagonist of the Micah’s idol narrative. Also called Michas.
The minor prophet and author of the Book of Micah.
A en given name.
Of, or relating to microscopes or microscopy; microscopal
So small that it can only be seen with the aid of a microscope.
Very small; minute
The middle of the night: the sixth temporal hour, equidistant between sunset and sunrise.

examples.english: During summer breaks, I ate dinner at midnight.
examples.chinese: 暑假里，我半夜十二点才吃晚饭。

current_entries.en_definition: Twelve o'clock at night exactly.
Demeanor; facial expression or attitude, especially one which is intended by its bearer.
A specific facial expression.
A city and comune, the capital of the Metropolitan City of Milan and the region of Lombardy, Italy.

examples.english: I live in Milan.
examples.chinese: 我住在米兰。

current_entries.en_definition: A metropolitan city of Lombardy, established in 2015; in full, the Metropolitan City of Milan.
A stone milepost (or by extension in other materials), one of a series of numbered markers placed along a road at regular intervals, typically at the side of the road or in a median.
(idiomatic) An important event in a person's life or career, in the history of a nation, in the life of some project, etc.
Characteristic of members of the armed forces.

examples.english: There is a military base near here.
examples.chinese: 這附近有一個軍事基地。

current_entries.en_definition: (North America) Relating to armed forces such as the army, marines, navy and air force (often as distinguished from civilians or police forces).
Relating to war.
Relating to armies or ground forces.
Armed forces.
Thousand-year-old; also (by extension, loosely) thousands of years old.
Occurring every thousand years.
Referring to the thousandth anniversary of an event or happening.

(by extension, originally, US, demography) Often capitalized: of or relating to, or characteristic of, people born in the last two decades of the 20th century from around the early 1980s to the mid 1990s (with 1996 births cited as the last Millennial year), and who reached adulthood early in the third millennium C.E.

(Christianity) Synonym of millenarian (“pertaining to the belief in an impending period of one thousand years of peace and righteousness associated with the Second Coming of Christ and his reign on earth”).

A river, a left tributary of the Komyshna, originating near the village of Yasnoprominske, having its course entirely within the Starobilsk Raion of the Luhansk Oblast of Ukraine, discharging into the Komyshna near the village of Striltsivka.
A village in Balakliia urban hromada, Izium Raion, Kharkiv Oblast, Ukraine, founded in 1686.
of, related to, or containing minerals

examples.english: That country is rich in mineral resources.
examples.chinese: 那個國家擁有豐富的礦物資源。

current_entries.en_definition: (geology) Any naturally occurring material that has a (more or less) definite chemical composition and characteristic physical properties; especially, an inorganic one.
Any inorganic material (as distinguished from animal or vegetable).
(nutrition) Any inorganic element that is essential to nutrition.
A vehicle, device or person with the purpose of removing explosive mines (landmines or water mines).
(uncountable, computing, video games) A logic-based computer game in which the player has to discover the position of mines in a rectangular grid, based on numerical hints.
A slow graceful dance consisting of a coupé, a high step, and a balance.
(music) A complete short musical composition inspired by and conforming to many formal characteristics of the traditional musical accompaniment to the dance of same name.
An event that appears inexplicable by the laws of nature and so is held to be supernatural in origin.
A fortunate outcome that prevails despite overwhelming odds against it.
An awesome and exceptional example of something.
(ambitransitive) To hear wrongly.
To misunderstand.
The act of mispronouncing.
A mispronounced word or phrase.
Any object used as a weapon by being thrown or fired through the air, such as stone, arrow or bullet. [from Template:SAFESUBST: c.]
(military) A self-propelled projectile whose trajectory can be adjusted after it is launched. [from Template:SAFESUBST: c.]
A set of tasks that fulfills a purpose or duty; an assignment set by an employer, or by oneself.
(countable, Catholicism) An infrequent gathering of religious believers in a parish, usually part of a larger regional event with a central theme.
